# Copilot Instructions

This project's governance — for humans and any model — lives in `docs/governance/`, not in
`.github/`. This file is a thin pointer kept here only so GitHub Copilot auto-discovers it.

Copilot does not auto-import the governance, so **load the two always-on core files below
first**, then deeper files only as the router's loading triggers call for them.

- **Start here:** [`docs/governance/README.md`](../docs/governance/README.md). Follow its
  scope-routing and loading rules.
- **Canonical authority:**
  [`docs/governance/generic/process/framework.md`](../docs/governance/generic/process/framework.md).
